'''lofavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:leafcutting|leafcutting]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-f-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leafcutting|leafcutting]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lofavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lofavithi|lofavithi]] || [[word:lofaviji|lofaviji]] || [[word:lofavishi|lofavishi]] || [[word:lofaviki|lofaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lofavuthuthu|lofavuthuthu]] || [[word:lofavujuju|lofavujuju]] || [[word:lofavushushu|lofavushushu]] || [[word:lofavukuku|lofavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lofavuthu|lofavuthu]] || [[word:lofavuju|lofavuju]] || [[word:lofavushu|lofavushu]] || [[word:lofavuku|lofavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lofavufthuf|lofavufthuf]] || [[word:lofavufjuf|lofavufjuf]] || [[word:lofavufshuf|lofavufshuf]] || [[word:lofavufkuf|lofavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lofavethe|lofavethe]] || [[word:lofaveje|lofaveje]] || [[word:lofaveshe|lofaveshe]] || [[word:lofaveke|lofaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lofavothotho|lofavothotho]] || [[word:lofavojojo|lofavojojo]] || [[word:lofavoshosho|lofavoshosho]] || [[word:lofavokoko|lofavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lofavotho|lofavotho]] || [[word:lofavojo|lofavojo]] || [[word:lofavosho|lofavosho]] || [[word:lofavoko|lofavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lofavofthof|lofavofthof]] || [[word:lofavofjof|lofavofjof]] || [[word:lofavofshof|lofavofshof]] || [[word:lofavofkof|lofavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lofavÃŸfthÃŸf|lofavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lofavÃŸfjÃŸf|lofavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lofavÃŸfshÃŸf|lofavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lofavÃŸfkÃŸf|lofavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lofavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|lofavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lofavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|lofavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lofavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|lofavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lofavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|lofavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lofavÃŸfthÃŸf|lofavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lofavÃŸfjÃŸf|lofavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lofavÃŸfshÃŸf|lofavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lofavÃŸfkÃŸf|lofavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lofavÃŸfthÃŸf|lofavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lofavÃŸfjÃŸf|lofavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lofavÃŸfshÃŸf|lofavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lofavÃŸfkÃŸf|lofavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lofavÃḊthÃḊ|lofavÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:lofavÃḊjÃḊ|lofavÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:lofavÃḊshÃḊ|lofavÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:lofavÃḊkÃḊ|lofavÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lofavathatha|lofavathatha]] || [[word:lofavajaja|lofavajaja]] || [[word:lofavashasha|lofavashasha]] || [[word:lofavakaka|lofavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lofavatha|lofavatha]] || [[word:lofavaja|lofavaja]] || [[word:lofavasha|lofavasha]] || [[word:lofavaka|lofavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lofavafthaf|lofavafthaf]] || [[word:lofavafjaf|lofavafjaf]] || [[word:lofavafshaf|lofavafshaf]] || [[word:lofavafkaf|lofavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lofavasha|lofavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lofavshÃḋsha|lofavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lofavrosha|lofavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lofavmusha|lofavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lofavyasha|lofavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golofavnkshÃḋsha|golofavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golofavnkrosha|golofavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golofavnkmusha|golofavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golofavnkyasha|golofavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lofafavasha|lofafavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lofafavshÃḋsha|lofafavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lofafavrosha|lofafavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lofafavmusha|lofafavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lofafavyasha|lofafavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golofafavnkshÃḋsha|golofafavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golofafavnkrosha|golofafavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golofafavnkmusha|golofafavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golofafavnkyasha|golofafavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lefÃḊvasha|lefÃḊvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lefÃḊvshÃḋsha|lefÃḊvshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lefÃḊvrosha|lefÃḊvrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lefÃḊvmusha|lefÃḊvmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lefÃḊvyasha|lefÃḊvyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golefÃḊvnkshÃḋsha|golefÃḊvnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golefÃḊvnkrosha|golefÃḊvnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golefÃḊvnkmusha|golefÃḊvnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golefÃḊvnkyasha|golefÃḊvnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lofavasha|lofavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lofavshÃḋsha|lofavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lofavrosha|lofavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lofavmusha|lofavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lofavyasha|lofavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golofavnkshÃḋsha|golofavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golofavnkrosha|golofavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golofavnkmusha|golofavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golofavnkyasha|golofavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
